text.title: Semantic Xml Content Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

conclusion.verdict: apply the methodology; produce the artefact and validate it.
preconditions not met; route to the correct methodology or skip.
